hierarchy.h2: text-5xl sm:text-6xl md:text-7xl leading-none tracking-tight uppercase font-extrabold

typography.custom_instructions: Headings must be extremely tight. Use fluid clamp for massive text. Never center-align by default; use left alignment for structural tension.

colors.custom_instructions: Never use pure white or pure black without texture. Primary accent is Signal Red. Use it sparingly for massive impact (CTAs, key lines).

layout_and_spacing.grid_system: Mode A: 'Tetris' Grid for portfolio, asymmetrical overlaps.
layout_and_spacing.surface_strategy: Grid Borders (Technical Look). Container: border-collapse. Items have border-r border-b. Expose the skeleton.
layout_and_spacing.custom_instructions: Avoid symmetrical center-aligned layouts. Use massive negative space. Build structural tension. Containers with borders must have internal padding (p-8).

animations: Hover states: Sharp background color fill (e.g., from transparent to Signal Red) with instant or extremely fast transition (0.1s).
Scroll: Fade-up and slight scale-up for portfolio items.
Marquee: Massive outline text running in background for services.
components_and_motion.buttons: Brutalist: sharp corners (rounded-none), thick borders (border-2), high contrast hover states (invert colors). No soft shadows.

media_and_assets.image_style: High contrast, desaturated or raw. Use CSS grayscale over images, removing grayscale on hover.

urls.hero_background: CSS noise texture overlay (bg-repeat) combined with dark gradient, no photograph needed for hero to emphasize typography.

page_sections_instructions.hero: Massive typography H1 taking up 80% of viewport. 'YOUR STUDIO'. Raw, unpolished. A running marquee underneath. Include WhatsApp and Calendly CTA buttons with stark high-contrast style.
page_sections_instructions.services: Grid Borders ('Technical' Look). Expose the skeleton. Services: Web Dev, AI Automation, App Dev, Ad Management, Social Media. Use IBM Plex Mono for technical descriptions.
page_sections_instructions.portfolio: Tetris grid. Asymmetrical image placement. Images must use 'grayscale hover:grayscale-0' transition.
page_sections_instructions.process: Numbered list with massive brutalist numbers (01, 02, 03) in the background. Tight typography.
page_sections_instructions.testimonials: Raw text quotes. Small, unpolished headshots (square cut, not rounded).
page_sections_instructions.contact: Massive footer. 'LET'S BUILD' in clamp(4rem, 10vw, 12rem). Huge Signal Red CTAs for WhatsApp and Calendly. Sticky WhatsApp icon in bottom right.

instructions_to_main_agent: DO NOT use generic Shadcn cards with rounded borders and soft shadows. Use raw HTML/Tailwind for structural tension.
Enforce strict grid borders (border-collapse, border-border) on the Services and Process sections.
Implement 'react-fast-marquee' for a massive background kinetic text element (e.g. 'AI AUTOMATION • WEB DEV • ').
Use data-testid attributes on all interactive elements (buttons, links).
Ensure the hero heading is massive, tight-tracked, and uses Bricolage Grotesque.
The entire aesthetic must feel technical, raw, and high-contrast. Use the Signal Red sparsely for maximum impact.
No teal, no purple. Use only Void Black, Bone White, and Signal Red.
Include global styles in index.css to import fonts and set brutalist anti-aliasing.
